name: codex-unity-comfyui-pipeline
description: Prototype Codex-orchestrated Unity asset pipeline for local ComfyUI/TRELLIS2 generation and post-processing.

interface.shortDescription: Prototype local ComfyUI asset generation with Codex-owned post-processing.
interface.longDescription: Codex Unity ComfyUI Pipeline is a solo-maintained prototype. It helps Codex orchestrate local ComfyUI/TRELLIS2 image-to-3D jobs, inspect generated meshes, write Unity import manifests, and install a thin Unity Editor template. Codex remains the user-directed decision layer; ComfyUI is only the local generation engine. No stability, support or installer reliability guarantee is provided at this stage.
defaultPrompt: Run a local ComfyUI batch and post-process it for Unity.
Install the Unity asset pipeline template in this project.
Inspect generated meshes and write Unity import manifests.
